Ample blackberries grow here by the stormwater drain. They grow in and under the fence on the southern edge of the drain. Falling Fruit season: May-June.

There are quite a few pecan trees on the western side of north 30th. Some may fall in the street. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
